Infinite Golf · Logo Presentation

Don't judge a logo on a white page. See it doing the job.

Use the tabs below to switch between options. Every mockup on the page updates at once, so you can compare each direction across the same real applications: social, print, apparel, signage, and stationery.

01

The lockups

Each option ships in three variants: the full combination mark, the icon on its own, and the reversed version for dark surfaces.

02

Feed posts and stories, built with photography from Saturday's shoot at Lakeview.

Infinite GolfRegina, SK

Premium indoor golfOpening 2026

Launch poster · alternate

Book a bay at 6 a.m. or midnight. The hours finally work around you.

Premium simulator bays with the comfort of a private club and none of the gatekeeping. Winter, spring, three in the morning; the season never ends here.

infinitegolf.caOpening 2026

Print ad · magazine spread

All the polish of a private club, with a door that opens for everyone.

Regina's first 24 hour premium golf venue. Bring your foursome, settle in, and play the courses you've always wanted to see.
